{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322104425ADAE995E79EB9242A01E"}"},"total":387},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7406980391311098648","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉非常好看😁我看的时候真的非常非常激动，就像是我们国家开始这样，然后我也参与了进去，非常有成就感"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724575631,"group_id":"7400669414346984473","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢小说，比较懒","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/+FkGIKBYskBV3GxzjjYHnpjRabfSc3yEcxb6yV7toR","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4d9f95abf9d149faacdbe39f9432d399~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709472&x-signature=JQvU0mQrfkW%2FU%2FraUjLLRTQc1w0%3D","user_id":"1849794160769597","user_name":"不爱吃酸爱吃辣"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1849794160769597","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7400669414346984473","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+重生+基建+爆囤物资+爆爽】
人类编年史，最后记载——
2150年，全球灾难频发，超级地震，万米海啸，恐怖极寒侵袭，全人类被迫迁徙，建造方舟，地下城抵御。
2153年，末日纪元降临，全球海洋冰封，所有大地崩裂破碎，人类纪元终结。
……
2149年，【愚公移山计划】发起者顾远，重生末日纪元前。
他先将消息汇报给国家，举国之力打造以太空站为核心的太空列车，建设抵御海啸的盘古之盾巨墙，建造可供超十亿人口居住的玄武巨城！
一年后，末日降临，西方不再趾高气昂，东方傲然崛起。
盘古之盾环绕四周，玄武巨城屹立不倒，太空列车呼啸疾驰，总设计师顾远成为东方的救星！
这一刻，西方几十亿人惊叹不已，东方炎龙，乃奇迹之国！
这一刻，全球齐声高呼：“求求你了，让我们也进入东方吧！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/87e31493ce46470b9f05d76697f6d095","author":"整点薯条吃吃","author_id":"","book_id":"7400669414346984473","book_name":"全民求生：我爆改国家科技树","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2416人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7400669558874325529","read_count":"2416","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1451828"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"667","tags":"科幻末世,重生,末世,囤物资,天灾,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6071fc6eec8d6d5fab74251a1052f75e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779331465&x-signature=8sdeaaKAu44F%2Bqn5OQ3KE9xnw%2B4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"764867679889712","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"26"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322104425ADAE995E79EB9242A01E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读38分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2283,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9829},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7435294126564623129","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一本真的很好看的末日文，前期铺垫很好，虽然有些专业的东西看不太懂但是都有做解释[震惊]，短短一年时间计画也是有条不紊的进行，举全国之力不放弃任何一个同胞[送心]，雖然等待的時間漫長但卻是有展示出一個個成果出來，最讓我驚喜的是還有救助動物的部分[爱慕]
PS.想看末日生存直接跳160章[注意]
（不懂那些一直说水的是什么心态，前面本来就该把背景跟配套方案说明清楚啊！不然一直事后打补丁不是更奇怪吗？又没有硬插入感情线或是单视角叙述，类群像本来就需要各个角度的烘托啊！）托啊！）[吃瓜]","text_exts":[{"e":135,"s":131,"text":"末日生存","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9C%AB%E6%97%A5%E7%94%9F%E5%AD%98&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741474659242A01E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227435294126564623129%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227400669414346984473%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9C%AB%E6%97%A5%E7%94%9F%E5%AD%98%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731169336,"group_id":"7400669414346984473","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人生两大理想：吃糖，睡饱","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N19mOkmYqgafg/frrMuoy20TYBOfTPHreFgB1DEF3WLT","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9a7632444c0b43919408d03bd5a64c1b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701252&x-signature=j%2Bz6spaoLxcZH24mppArEOyWBwU%3D","user_id":"2960317659226861","user_name":"天天想吃糖糖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2960317659226861","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1733362263,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7400669414346984473","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+重生+基建+爆囤物资+爆爽】

他先将消息汇报给国家，举国之力打造以太空站为核心的太空列车，建设抵御海啸的盘古之盾巨墙，建造可供超十亿人口居住的玄武巨城！
一年后，末日降临，西方不再趾高气昂，东方傲然崛起。

这一刻，全球齐声高呼：“求求你了，让我们也进入东方吧！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/87e31493ce46470b9f05d76697f6d095","author":"整点薯条吃吃","author_id":"","book_id":"7400669414346984473","book_name":"全民求生：我爆改国家科技树","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2416人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7400669558874325529","read_count":"2416","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1451828"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"667","tags":"科幻末世,重生,末世,囤物资,天灾,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6071fc6eec8d6d5fab74251a1052f75e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779331465&x-signature=8sdeaaKAu44F%2Bqn5OQ3KE9xnw%2B4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"764867679889712","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"266"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322104425ADAE995E79EB9242A01E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":23086,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":27932,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":12387},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7418876851413877566","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"五星好评，作为一个影视作品及小说爱好者来说，这个作品呢总体来说适合影视化，因为光看小说不知道大家是怎么觉得，我是觉得很多内容太过于细致化（废话太多），100多张我我看了40多章之后，我跳到60多章看，并且没有看下去的欲望。得出的结论就是：语言艺术不够丰满，虽然每一个工程量都在按部就班，每一个大场面都渲染的还算到位，但是就是差那么一点点的语言艺术渲染。不敢想象一百多张作者是以陈述的方式写小说，还是以叙述的方式。如果一直保持这样，我感觉没必要写下去了。千篇一律的平淡，任何大场面都没有那种张力，写下去无非就是凑字数而已。更何况连灾难都还没到，剧情就已经这么平平淡淡，有点大脑疲劳。完全没有刺激感，紧迫感，所以由衷的奉劝一下作者，你的作品呢可以说是优秀中的优秀，就是这么优秀的一个作品，让我觉得有那么一点点瑕疵。并不是我故意挑刺啊，这是作为一个读者对作者对作品的一种认真负责的态度，也希望这种好的作品能搬到大银幕上。因为我们国家除了《流浪地球》，基本没有什么拿得出手的科幻片了。我很喜欢你的作品。加油！","text_exts":[{"e":420,"s":416,"text":"流浪地球","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B5%81%E6%B5%AA%E5%9C%B0%E7%90%83&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741474659242A01E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227418876851413877566%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227400669414346984473%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B5%81%E6%B5%AA%E5%9C%B0%E7%90%83%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1727349352,"group_id":"7400669414346984473","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"缺钱了，来薅点书友羊毛","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwhjIdoXI55GUqyJpSSCokIvTbz+bKZK7jESxZcdoZHw","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c8bdcdf367c94895a3ea4b2f9ec791a1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706893&x-signature=sWbKx2IiVsJxFgZre3eYWSTZ5ck%3D","user_id":"1095532237568573","user_name":"听风入耳"},"expand_extra":{},
